title: Bridge Essay: An ontogenetic role for Broca's and related speech areas in schizophrenic audito

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**An ontogenetic role for Broca'sand related speech areas in schizophrenic auditory hallucinations? Evidence from sulcal pits analysis.** — Psychiatry research (2025). PMID: . DOI: 10.1016/j.psychres.2025.116502. Score: 38. The pathogenesis of auditory verbal hallucinations (AVH), acore symptom of schizophrenia, is unknown, but there is increasing interest in the possibility that it involves brain structural changes. We used anovel whole brain structural imaging technique, sulcal pits analysis, to measure different parameters of sulcal pits, the deepest points in each fold of the cerebral cortex, in 24 schizophrenia patients with continuous or near-continuous hallucinations (AVH-frequent) and 22 matched patients
